Furthermore, the performance does not follow the previously established trend of improving accuracies in recent runs.

metadata.message: The new run achieved a validation accuracy of 0.832, which is lower than multiple prior runs, particularly a run that achieved 0.863. This indicates a potential inconsistency in results and suggests that the model's performance may not be improving, despite adjustments such as changing weight decay and dropout settings. Furthermore, the performance does not follow the previously established trend of improving accuracies in recent runs.
metadata.recommendation: The researcher should investigate potential inconsistencies in the dataset or configurations used in this run. It may also be beneficial to evaluate the training and validation datasets for quality and label noise or revisit hyperparameter tuning strategies to ensure they align with the hyperparameters yielding better results in previous runs.

findings.content: The new run's validation accuracy of 0.7947 is significantly lower than the highest validation accuracy of 0.863 from prior runs, despite using a learning rate of 0.005 with SGD, which is not expected to yield better results than configurations using Adam with lower learning rates that produced higher accuracies in earlier runs.

metadata.message: The new run's validation accuracy of 0.7947 is significantly lower than the highest validation accuracy of 0.863 from prior runs, despite using a learning rate of 0.005 with SGD, which is not expected to yield better results than configurations using Adam with lower learning rates that produced higher accuracies in earlier runs.
metadata.recommendation: Investigate possible issues with the dataset or configuration, as well as further explore the effects of the optimizer and learning rate selections. Consider whether the training data used in this run has been contaminated or differs from previous configurations.

findings.content: The new run achieved a validation accuracy of 0.863, which is significantly higher than most prior runs, especially considering that the previous best was 0.863 with a different configuration. This improvement, combined with the use of a much higher learning rate (0.1), raises concerns about potential inconsistencies with the dataset quality or the validity of the results.

metadata.message: The new run achieved a validation accuracy of 0.863, which is significantly higher than most prior runs, especially considering that the previous best was 0.863 with a different configuration. This improvement, combined with the use of a much higher learning rate (0.1), raises concerns about potential inconsistencies with the dataset quality or the validity of the results.
metadata.recommendation: Investigate the dataset for any inconsistencies or potential contamination. Additionally, consider validating results against a held-out test set to ensure that the performance is not a result of overfitting or other anomalies.

findings.content: This configuration leverages the highest-impact parameter, learning rate (lr) set at 0.1, which has consistently shown to significantly improve validation accuracy. Additionally, it increases the number of epochs to 3 for enhanced training while maintaining higher values of dropout (0.25) to help with regularization and prevent overfitting. The conv_channels and hidden_dim have also been set to their best values observed, which allows for a more complex model that can capture the nuances of the FashionMNIST dataset.

metadata.rationale: This configuration leverages the highest-impact parameter, learning rate (lr) set at 0.1, which has consistently shown to significantly improve validation accuracy. Additionally, it increases the number of epochs to 3 for enhanced training while maintaining higher values of dropout (0.25) to help with regularization and prevent overfitting. The conv_channels and hidden_dim have also been set to their best values observed, which allows for a more complex model that can capture the nuances of the FashionMNIST dataset.
metadata.expected_direction: I expect the validation accuracy to improve, potentially exceeding the previously achieved 0.863 by up to 0.02 based on the impact of fine-tuning these parameters.
unexplored_regions: learning rates between 0.005 and 0.03 which may provide alternative performance characteristics
the combination of higher weight decay values, such as 0.001, for potential regularization benefits
increased dropout rates above 0.25 to further investigate their effect on model performance

papers.title: Adam: A Method for Stochastic Optimization
papers.key_insight: This foundational paper introduces the Adam optimizer, demonstrating its efficiency and effectiveness in training deep learning models compared to traditional methods.
papers.actionable_suggestion: Experiment with finer adjustments to the learning rate schedule when using Adam to stabilize the training process.

papers.title: Understanding Deep Learning Requires Re-thinking Generalization
papers.key_insight: This paper discusses how standard generalization metrics may not adequately predict model performance, offering insights into overfitting and the biases introduced by training methods.
papers.actionable_suggestion: Increase dropout rates or introduce Batch Normalization to improve generalization and reduce overfitting as noted in the paper.

papers.title: Regularization Techniques for Neural Networks
papers.venue: IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems, 2018
papers.key_insight: This review covers various regularization techniques, including dropout, weight decay, and their impacts on model performance.
papers.actionable_suggestion: Incorporate weight decay adjustments mentioned in the paper to prevent overfitting while training, particularly in configurations with high capacity.

papers.title: Deep Learning for Computer Vision: A Brief Review
papers.key_insight: This survey highlights the key architectural designs and techniques in computer vision tasks, emphasizing their implications on performance and accuracy.
papers.actionable_suggestion: Explore architectural variations, such as deeper convolutions or residual connections, that may enhance model performance in the fashion MNIST task.

papers.title: On the Importance of Initialization and Momentum in Deep Learning
papers.key_insight: This study presents the role of weight initialization and momentum in training deep neural networks, impacting convergence and overall accuracy.
papers.actionable_suggestion: Implement momentum in the SGD optimizer to potentially improve convergence rates and validation accuracy.

findings.content: Investigate the dataset for label noise and ensure stable dataset splits to improve validation accuracy consistency.

issues.description: High variance in validation accuracy between runs with similar configurations indicates potential issues with dataset splits.
Significant fluctuations in validation accuracy suggest possible label noise in the dataset.

metadata.recommendation: Investigate the dataset for label noise and ensure stable dataset splits to improve validation accuracy consistency.

proj_iris_sweep_demo_0d096d74.summary: Across 3 completed runs: The most impactful hyperparameter is 'lr' (moves val_accuracy by ~0.27); best value seen: 0.01. Best on iris_synth: val_accuracy=0.88.

proj_blobs3_sgd_demo_0d78c7c9.summary: Across 6 completed runs: The most impactful hyperparameter is 'lr' (moves val_accuracy by ~0.0354); best value seen: 0.5. 'weight_decay' had the least effect (0.0013). Best on blobs3: val_accuracy=0.6566.

proj_fashionmnist_cnn_sweep_3cddf661.summary: Across 10 completed runs: The most impactful hyperparameter is 'lr' (moves val_accuracy by ~0.1903); best value seen: 0.1. 'optimizer' had the least effect (0.0111). Best on FashionMNIST: val_accuracy=0.863.
